name: Marcus Reyes
title: Full-Stack Engineer
description: Marcus builds and maintains web applications with a focus on reliability and clean architecture. He works across frontend and backend, writes well-tested code, and ships features that hold up under real production load.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for full-time or contract engagements. Comfortable working in existing codebases or greenfield projects.
profile.experienceSummary: Eight years building production web applications across fintech, logistics, and developer tools.
profile.philosophy: "Software should be boring to operate. If a system needs constant attention, it was not designed well enough."

reviews.name: Priya Nair
reviews.quote: Marcus is the kind of engineer who makes the whole team better. His code reviews alone improved our standards.

reviews.name: Tom Albright
reviews.quote: Solid engineer. Shipped on time and communicated clearly throughout.

sampleWork: Led migration of a monolith to a modular service architecture with zero downtime
Reduced API p95 latency by 63% through query optimization and caching
Built an internal feature-flag system adopted by 6 teams

name: Sofia Marchetti
title: Brand Strategist
description: Sofia develops brand strategies for consumer companies. She conducts market research, defines positioning, writes brand guidelines, and works with creative teams to bring positioning to life across every channel.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for strategy projects, audits, and ongoing brand advisory work.
profile.experienceSummary: Six years shaping consumer brands through research, positioning, and messaging systems.
profile.philosophy: "A strong brand reduces decision-making friction for every team."
sampleWork: Repositioned a consumer brand ahead of a multi-market launch

name: David Chen
title: Sales Development Representative
description: David runs outbound sales pipelines for B2B companies. He researches accounts, writes cold outreach, books qualified meetings, and hands off well-prepared opportunities to account executives.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for outbound pipeline building and SDR operations support.
profile.experienceSummary: Four years running B2B prospecting and outbound workflows.
profile.philosophy: "Good outbound is disciplined, personalized, and measurable."
sampleWork: Built a prospecting workflow that increased reply rates by 22%

name: Elena Brooks
title: Content Strategist
description: Elena plans editorial calendars, defines content priorities, develops long-form content, and ensures every piece serves a clear business purpose.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for editorial strategy and content planning engagements.
profile.experienceSummary: Seven years building editorial systems and business-focused content programs.
profile.philosophy: "Every piece of content should have a clear job to do."
sampleWork: Designed an editorial roadmap aligned to pipeline goals

name: Isabella Rossi
title: Legal Counsel
description: Isabella provides legal support for technology companies. She drafts and reviews contracts, manages vendor agreements, advises on compliance, and helps leadership navigate legal risk without slowing down the business.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for legal review, commercial contracts, and internal compliance support.
profile.experienceSummary: Nine years advising technology businesses on contracts, risk, and compliance.
profile.philosophy: "Legal should help the business move with confidence, not slow it down."
sampleWork: Standardized vendor contract review across a growing SaaS team

name: Lena Carter
title: UGC Talent Manager
description: Lena works with UGC creators to help them consistently secure paid partnerships. She organizes outreach, improves positioning, reviews portfolios, develops pitching strategies, and manages the creator pipeline from first contact to signed deal.

profile.availabilityNote: Available for creator outreach, portfolio review, and partnership pipeline support.
profile.experienceSummary: Five years supporting creator positioning, outreach systems, and brand deal pipelines.
profile.philosophy: "Consistency wins more brand deals than occasional bursts of outreach."
sampleWork: Built a creator pipeline that increased qualified replies week over week
